papers.title: Pseudo-Unification: Entropy Probing Reveals Divergent Information Patterns in Unified Multimodal Models
papers.abstract: Abstract Unified multimodal models suffer from pseudo-unification due to asymmetric encoding and split response patterns, requiring consistent information flow for genuine multimodal synergy.  AI-generated summary Unified multimodal models (UMMs) were designed to combine the reasoning ability of large language models (LLMs) with the generation capability of vision models. In practice, however, this synergy remains elusive: UMMs fail to transfer LLM-like reasoning to image synthesis and exhibit divergent response behaviors. We term this phenomenon pseudo-unification. Diagnosing its internal causes is important, but existing probing methods either lack model-internal insight or ignore prompt-response dependencies. To address these limitations, we propose an information-theoretic probing framework that jointly analyzes how UMMs encode inputs and generate outputs. Applied to ten representative UMMs, our framework reveals that pseudo-unification stems from a dual divergence: (i) Modality-Asymmetric Encoding, where vision and language follow different entropy trajectories, and (ii) Pattern-Split Response, where text generation exhibits high-entropy creativity while image synthesis enforces low-entropy fidelity. Only models that unify both sides (e.g., via contextual prediction) achieve more genuine unification, enabling stronger reasoning-based text-to-image generation even with fewer parameters. Our work provides the first model-internal probing of unification, demonstrating that real multimodal synergy requires consistency in information flow, not just shared parameters.

ru.title: Единый поток информации — ключ к подлинной мультимодальной синергии
ru.desc: Исследование выявило, что унифицированные мультимодальные модели страдают от псевдо-унификации из-за асимметричного кодирования визуальной и текстовой информации. Авторы разработали информационно-теоретический фреймворк для анализа внутренних механизмов этих моделей, обнаружив, что текстовая генерация работает в режиме высокой энтропии, а синтез изображений требует низкую энтропию. Исследование показало, что только модели, унифицирующие оба потока информации через согласованное предсказание контекста, достигают подлинной синергии. Результаты демонстрируют, что настоящая мультимодальная интеграция требует не просто общих параметров, а согласованности в потоке информации.

en.title: Achieving True Synergy in Multimodal Models
en.desc: This paper discusses the challenges faced by Unified Multimodal Models (UMMs) in achieving true synergy between language and vision tasks. It identifies a problem called pseudo-unification, where these models do not effectively transfer reasoning capabilities from language to image generation. The authors propose a new information-theoretic probing framework to analyze how UMMs encode inputs and generate outputs, revealing that issues arise from Modality-Asymmetric Encoding and Pattern-Split Response. The findings suggest that genuine multimodal synergy requires consistent information flow rather than merely sharing parameters across modalities.

zh.title: 实现真正的多模态协同需要一致的信息流
zh.desc: 统一的多模态模型（UMMs）旨在结合大型语言模型（LLMs）的推理能力和视觉模型的生成能力。然而，这种协同作用在实践中并不明显，UMMs在图像合成中无法有效转移LLM的推理能力，并表现出不同的响应行为。我们称这种现象为伪统一，分析其内部原因至关重要。我们提出了一种信息论探测框架，揭示伪统一源于模态不对称编码和响应模式分裂，只有通过上下文预测等方式统一两者，才能实现更真实的多模态协同。
